## Summary

Describe the user-visible or system-level change in 2-5 lines.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate:fast`
- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] Additional checks run, if any:

## Perf

- [ ] Not perf-sensitive
- [ ] `npm run perf:capture:combat120`
- [ ] `npm run perf:capture:openfrontier:short`
- [ ] `npm run perf:compare -- --scenario <scenario>`

## Playtest

- [ ] Not required
- [ ] Required and completed
- [ ] Required but not completed

If playtest was required, note what was covered or why it is still pending.

## Interface Fence

- [ ] `src/types/SystemInterfaces.ts` untouched
- [ ] Fence touched and PR title includes `[interface-change]`

## Risks

- Residual risk:
- Follow-up work:
